top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as Hormuz Doubts Lift Oil and Yields: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rebound in US equities faded while oil and bond yields rose as traders waited to see whether hopes of a US-Iran peace agreement would translate into tangible progress.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Acuity Analytics Launches Domain-Led Agentic AI Platform to Help Financial Institutions Move from Experimentation to Enterprise Value
top_signals.summary: Combining agentic AI with deep human expertise to deliver governed, decision ready outcomes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
